untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Detection of 'key price levels with historical hidden order activity' — no indicator in allowed list measures hidden liquidity or historical order clustering; (2) Bid-ask spread comparison — no bid-ask spread indicator available; (3) Explicit IOC order execution logic and order priority mechanics — backtest engine indicators do not include order type execution or time-of-flight priority ranking; (4) Probe order fill detection and sequential pinging strategy — requires order-level tracking not present in OHLCV-based indicators
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a market microstructure strategy that depends on real-time order book state, order execution mechanics (IOC vs limit), and temporal sequencing of probe orders. The ALLOWED INDICATORS set contains only OHLCV-derived technical indicators and cannot express: hidden order detection, bid-ask spread dynamics, order execution outcomes, or the sequential decision logic required for adaptive liquidity probing. Recommend: (1) Use a dedicated market microstructure backtest framework with order book depth data; (2) Implement this as a live trading algorithm with direct exchange API access; (3) If using this engine, approximate as 'enter on support with widening volatility, exit on volume spike' but recognize this loses the core signal intent
